criterion: Quality and efficiency of the implementation

sub_sections.title: Work plan and resources
sub_sections.content: MAESTRO comprises 9 WPs over 48 months (TRL 2→5, CC-01). WP1 (Project Management and Coordination, lead: Alpenstadt Technical University (ATU), M1-48) provides governance and ethics compliance. WP2 (Neuro-Symbolic Planning and Reasoning Engine, ATU, M1-36) develops the Neuro-symbolic planning engine for autonomous task decomposition; WP3 (Adaptive Memory Architecture, Breda Institute for Intelligent Systems (BIIS), M1-30) develops the Unified adaptive memory architecture; WP4 (Decentralised Multi-Agent Coordination, Centre Européen de Recherche en Informatique Avancée (CERIA), M3-36) develops Decentralised multi-agent coordination protocols. Demonstrators (SR-07): WP5 (Healthcare, Nordic Institute of Health Sciences (NIHS), M12-42), WP6 (Manufacturing, Istituto Superiore di Ingegneria Avanzata (ISIA), M12-42), WP7 (Logistics, EuroLog International AG (ELI), M12-42). WP8 (Integration, Evaluation and Benchmarking, Fundación Ibérica de Innovación Tecnológica (FIIT), M6-48) integrates pillars and the External Tool and API Orchestration Layer with benchmarking (CC-06). WP9 (Dissemination, Boreal AI Labs Oy (BAL), M1-48) manages open-source release and AI-on-demand platform sharing (SR-10/CC-05). Twenty deliverables include specifications, software prototypes, datasets, and mandatory plans (D1-02 Data management plan M6; D9-01 Dissemination and exploitation plan M6). The dependency map has 16 data_input edges, no cycles, and 9 tied critical paths of 3 edges (e.g., WP2→WP5→WP8→WP9). Eleven milestones span M3-M48. Management: General Assembly (biannual, all partners), Project Management Committee (quarterly, ATU chair), Ethics and Quality Oversight Committee (ATU/NIHS). Ethics: Categories 8 (AI), 4 (health data), 2 (clinical participants) triggered; civil focus confirmed. Risk register: 11 risks (technical, external, organisational) with assigned mitigation. Resources validated via budget gate (pass, all WPs and partners covered).

sub_sections.title: Capacity of participants and consortium as a whole
sub_sections.content: The consortium unites 8 partners across 8 countries (DE, FR, NL, IT, SE, CH, FI, ES), combining academic AI research, clinical domain expertise, industrial deployment, and platform integration capability. Alpenstadt Technical University (ATU, DE, coordinator) leads WP1 and WP2, providing expertise in neuro-symbolic AI, automated planning, and LLM-based reasoning. Centre Européen de Recherche en Informatique Avancée (CERIA, FR) leads WP4, contributing formal multi-agent coordination, distributed AI, and game-theoretic cooperation. Breda Institute for Intelligent Systems (BIIS, NL) leads WP3, bringing deep learning, retrieval-augmented generation, and neural memory architecture expertise. Istituto Superiore di Ingegneria Avanzata (ISIA, IT) leads WP6, providing digital twins, smart factory systems, and operational pilot factory access. Nordic Institute of Health Sciences (NIHS, SE) leads WP5, offering clinical AI decision support research, de-identified clinical datasets, and clinical validation pathways. EuroLog International AG (ELI, CH) leads WP7, supplying real-world logistics data across international corridors and cross-sector transfer validation. Boreal AI Labs Oy (BAL, FI) leads WP9, contributing LLM fine-tuning, production-grade AI deployment, open-source release management, and AI-on-demand platform integration. Fundación Ibérica de Innovación Tecnológica (FIIT, ES) leads WP8, providing evaluation frameworks, benchmarking methodologies, TEF coordination (CC-07), and EDIH network dissemination. ATU leads two WPs (WP1, WP2) reflecting its dual coordinator and Pillar 1 research lead role; each remaining partner leads one WP. Partners complement each other across the value chain: academic research (ATU, CERIA, BIIS), domain application (NIHS, ISIA), industrial deployment (ELI, BAL), and evaluation and transfer (FIIT).

claim_statuses.claim_summary: Dependency map has 16 data_input edges with no cycles
Budget gate passed with no blocking inconsistencies
